text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted a Lebanese Red Cross center in the city of Tyre, killing the injured being transported and causing damage to the vehicles within the facility. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩泰尔市的一个黎巴嫩红十字会中心，造成正在转运的伤员死亡，并损坏了设施内的车辆。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 01:20 and 09:45 on April 13 that they carried out rocket and drone attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Doviv, and Shlomi, as well as the Matalba position. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，4月13日01:20至09:45期间，他们对基里亚特什莫纳、多维夫和什洛米定居点以及马塔尔巴阵地发动了火箭弹和无人机袭击。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike on Al Mansouri plain, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Reuters: An Israeli airstrike killed an infant girl during her father’s funeral in southern Lebanon, in the village of Srifa. The child, reportedly under two years old, was among several family members killed when their home was struck, while her sister was seriously wounded. The Israeli military said it did not have sufficient details on the incident but stated it takes measures to avoid civilian harm. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部Al Mansouri平原。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 路透社：以色列的一次空袭在黎巴嫩南部斯里法村的一场葬礼上炸死了一名女婴。据报道，这名不到两岁的女婴在房屋被击中时与多名家庭成员一同遇难，她的姐姐也受了重伤。以色列军方表示，对该事件没有足够细节，但声称已采取措施避免平民伤害。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇱🇧 MTV on the latest developments in Beirut: Qatar Airways will resume its flights to Beirut International Airport starting the morning of April 14, operating one flight per day. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇱🇧 MTV关于贝鲁特最新进展的报道：卡塔尔航空将于4月14日上午恢复飞往贝鲁特国际机场的航班，每天运营一班。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Channel 12 on the latest developments on the Lebanese front: The first round of negotiations between Israel and Lebanon is expected to take place tomorrow in an effort to reach a ceasefire and a lasting agreement. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Channel 12 on the latest developments in southern Lebanon: It has been decided to establish 15 permanent camps in the front-line area of Lebanese villages following Netanyahu and Katz’s visit yesterday to the IDF Northern Command. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：预计以色列和黎巴嫩之间的第一轮谈判将于明天举行，旨在达成停火和长期协议。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩南部最新进展：继内塔尼亚胡和卡茨昨天访问以军北方司令部后，决定在黎巴嫩村庄的前线地区建立15个永久营地。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Channel 12 on latest developments on the Lebanese front: The army has been instructed to achieve as many targets as possible in Lebanon in case it is forced to halt operations before the start of negotiations tomorrow. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Channel 12 on the latest developments on the Lebanese front: The first round of negotiations between Israel and Lebanon is expected to take place tomorrow in an effort to reach a ceasefire and a lasting agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：军方已接到指示，如果被迫在明天谈判开始前停止行动，需在黎巴嫩实现尽可能多的目标。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：预计以色列和黎巴嫩之间的第一轮谈判将于明天举行，旨在达成停火和长期协议。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Channel 12: Hezbollah launched more than 400 rockets and 40 drones since the ceasefire with Iran, causing direct damage to 25 buildings. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Channel 12 on latest developments on the Lebanese front: The army has been instructed to achieve as many targets as possible in Lebanon in case it is forced to halt operations before the start of negotiations tomorrow. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 第12频道：自与伊朗停火以来，真主党发射了400多枚火箭弹和40架无人机，直接损坏了25座建筑物。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 第12频道关于黎巴嫩前线最新进展：军方已接到指示，如果被迫在明天谈判开始前停止行动，需在黎巴嫩实现尽可能多的目标。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Channel 12: Hezbollah launched more than 400 rockets and 40 drones since the ceasefire with Iran, causing direct damage to 25 buildings. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 第12频道：自与伊朗停火以来，真主党发射了400多枚火箭弹和40架无人机，直接损坏了25座建筑物。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch is greeted by her dog after returning home from a 10-day mission around the Moon. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043596126444528070/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 阿尔忒弥斯2号宇航员克里斯蒂娜·科赫在结束为期10天的绕月任务回家后，受到了她的狗的迎接。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2043596126444528070/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ According to DeepState, Russia used the “Easter Truce” selectively in favorable areas to improve its positions. ▪️ The pause was used to evacuate wounded personnel, deliver ammunition, and conduct troop rotations. ▪️ Russian units reportedly used white flags to approach and carry out reinforcement efforts, particularly in the Hulyaipole direction. ▪️ An increase in assault intensity is expected following the end of the “truce.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 据DeepState称，俄罗斯有选择地在有利地区利用“复活节停火”来改善其阵地。 ▪️ 停火期间被用于撤离伤员、运送弹药和进行部队轮换。 ▪️ 据报道，俄军部队利用白旗接近并进行增援，特别是在胡利亚伊波莱方向。 ▪️ 预计“停火”结束后，袭击强度将会增加。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran says no port in the Gulf region will be safe if its own ports are threatened, as the United States prepares to enforce blockade. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗表示，如果其自身港口受到威胁，海湾地区的任何港口都不会安全，因为美国正准备实施封锁。 推文

text: Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: We need China to open up so that Europe does not have to close itself. Our trade deficit with China grew 18% last year. That is unsustainable.
text_zh: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯在中国表示：我们需要中国开放，这样欧洲就不必自我封闭。我们去年对中国的贸易逆差增长了18%。这是不可持续的。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 ⚡️ U.S. and Indonesia are discussing permission for U.S. military to access Indonesian airspace . Hegseth to meet with Indonesian Defense Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin today
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇩 ⚡️ 美国和印度尼西亚正在讨论允许美军进入印尼领空的事宜。赫格塞斯将于今天会见印尼国防部长沙夫里·沙姆苏丁

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇵🇸 Netanyahu Declares New Genocide Phase: IOF to Resume Brutal Operations in Gaza to "Disarm" Hamas Netanyahu: "Trump failed to mobilize a coalition to open the Strait of Hormuz, so he also understands that building a coalition to disarm Hamas is less realistic. We will have to do it. We will have to do it."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇵🇸 内塔尼亚胡宣布种族灭绝新阶段：以色列国防军将恢复在加沙的残酷行动以“解除”哈马斯武装。内塔尼亚胡：“特朗普未能动员联盟来开放霍尔木兹海峡，所以他也明白建立一个解除哈马斯武装的联盟是不太现实的。我们将不得不这样做。我们将不得不这样做。”

text: Iran's Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf had impressed the American team as a “refined and professional bargainer, and potential leader of a new Iran.” Source: David Ignatius, WaPo
text_zh: 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫给美国团队留下了“精明、专业的谈判者，以及新伊朗潜在领导人”的印象。来源：大卫·伊格内修斯，《华盛顿邮报》

text: Washington Post Columnist David Ignatius: The blockade is a pressure tactic, to be sure, but not primarily a military one. Trump has no appetite for further armed conflict. He knows that the upsides are limited and the ‘tail risk’ is large. A ground attack… might lead the U.S. into a quagmire.
text_zh: 《华盛顿邮报》专栏作家大卫·伊格内修斯：封锁无疑是一种压力策略，但主要不是军事策略。特朗普没有进一步武装冲突的胃口。他知道上行空间有限，而“尾部风险”很大。地面攻击……可能会将美国拖入泥潭。

text: Iran's First Deputy Speaker of Parliament Ali Nikzad: They had not come to take [rescue] a pilot. They had come to take something else; to take it and put it on display.
text_zh: 伊朗议会第一副议长阿里·尼克扎德：他们不是来营救飞行员的。他们是来拿别的东西的；拿走它并进行展示。

text: Open Source Intel A senior Pakistani Foreign Ministry source told Qatar's Al-Arabi Al-Jadid that Pakistani officials are working to convince the U.S. delegation to return to negotiations with Iran. Talks between Pakistani officials and both the Iranian and American delegations took place in "a positive atmosphere," with both sides still interested in dialogue. Pakistani FM Ishaq Dar spoke with his Saudi, Turkish, and Egyptian counterparts to coordinate efforts to maintain the ceasefire and reduce tensions. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一位巴基斯坦外交部高级消息人士告诉卡塔尔《新阿拉伯人报》，巴基斯坦官员正在努力说服美国代表团重返与伊朗的谈判。巴基斯坦官员与伊朗和美国代表团之间的会谈在“积极的氛围”中进行，双方仍对对话感兴趣。巴基斯坦外交部长伊沙克·达尔与沙特、土耳其和埃及同行进行了交谈，以协调努力维持停火并缓解紧张局势。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: "I have no fear. I am willing to give my life for the Revolution. Removing one person will not solve anything. There are hundreds ready to assume responsibility." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590833379700868/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：“我没有恐惧。我愿意为革命献出生命。除掉一个人解决不了任何问题。有数百人准备承担责任。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590833379700868/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @jurgen_nauditt : The Chinese are having fun with Trump. https://twitter.com/jurgen_nauditt/status/2043402217986683246/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @jurgen_nauditt : 中国人正在拿特朗普开玩笑。 https://twitter.com/jurgen_nauditt/status/2043402217986683246/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Cuban President Díaz-Canel responding to Trump's invasion threats: "Whoever tries to take over Cuba will collect her blood-soaked soil if he does not perish in the struggle." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590499345261050/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 古巴总统迪亚斯-卡内尔回应特朗普的入侵威胁：“任何试图占领古巴的人，如果不在斗争中丧生，就将收集她那浸透鲜血的土地。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043590499345261050/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump says a blockade is set to take effect as countries move to restrict Iran’s oil exports, adding tankers are rerouting to the U.S.: "At 10 o'clock tomorrow we have a blockade going into effect...other nations are working so that Iran will not be able to sell oil and that would be very effective!" "There are MANY boats heading toward our country to fill up with oil and then go and take it, so they're not going to go through the Hormuz strait and ultimately that'll be corrected." "But in the meantime, they're using us!" "We have more oil because of Drill Baby Drill, we have more oil than Russia and Saudi Arabia put together." "So if you look at Russia and Saudi Arabia, two big ones, we have much more oil than they have put together. And what's happening is boats are coming over here, filling up, we don't have to go through the Hormuz strait!" tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普表示，随着各国采取行动限制伊朗石油出口，封锁即将生效，并补充说油轮正在改道前往美国：“明天10点我们将实施封锁……其他国家正在努力，使伊朗无法出售石油，这将非常有效！” “有很多船只正前往我国装满石油，然后运走，所以它们不会经过霍尔木兹海峡，最终这会得到纠正。” “但与此同时，它们在利用我们！” “由于‘钻探吧，宝贝，钻探吧’，我们拥有更多的石油，我们拥有的石油比俄罗斯和沙特加起来还要多。” “所以如果你看看俄罗斯和沙特这两个大国，我们拥有的石油比它们加起来还要多。发生的情况是，船只来到这里，装满油，我们不必经过霍尔木兹海峡！” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The spokesperson for Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters says security in the Gulf and Sea of Oman “is either for everyone or no one.” He warns that vessels linked to Iran’s enemies will be barred from the Strait of Hormuz, adding that any threats to Iranian ports would place all regional ports at risk. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人表示，海湾和阿曼湾的安全“要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于”。他警告说，与伊朗敌人有关的船只将被禁止通过霍尔木兹海峡，并补充说，任何对伊朗港口的威胁都将使所有区域港口处于危险之中。 @wfwitness

text: Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ Spokesperson: Security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman is either for everyone or for no one. Enemy-affiliated vessels do not and will not have the right to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. Other vessels will be allowed to transit the strait in compliance with the regulations of the Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran. If the security of ports of the Islamic Republic of Iran is threatened, no port in the Persian Gulf or the Sea of Oman will remain safe.
text_zh: 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人：波斯湾和阿曼湾港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于。与敌人有关的船只没有，将来也不会有权通过霍尔木兹海峡。其他船只在遵守伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队法规的情况下将被允许通过海峡。如果伊朗伊斯兰共和国港口的安全受到威胁，波斯湾或阿曼湾的任何港口都不会保持安全。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: I have no fear. I am willing to give my life for the Revolution. Removing one person will not solve anything. There are hundreds ready to assume responsibility.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：我没有恐惧。我愿意为革命献出生命。除掉一个人解决不了任何问题。有数百人准备承担责任。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel: If the time comes, we’ll defend ourselves. And if we need to die, we’ll die.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔：如果时机到来，我们将保卫自己。如果我们需要牺牲，我们就会牺牲。

text: Cuba's President Miguel Díaz-Canel on Trump's invasion threats over Cuba: Whoever tries to take over Cuba will collect her blood-soaked soil if he does not perish in the struggle.
text_zh: 古巴总统米格尔·迪亚斯-卡内尔谈及特朗普对古巴的入侵威胁：任何试图占领古巴的人，如果不在斗争中丧生，就将收集她那浸透鲜血的土地。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 "Security of ports in the Persian Gulf and the Sea of Oman is either for everyone or for no one" Lieutenant Colonel Ebrahim Zolfaghari, spokesperson for Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters issued a statement as the US Central Command (CENTCOM) prepared to enforce the blockade starting at 10 a.m. ET: -- Iran’s armed forces view defending national sovereignty in its territorial waters as a “natural and legal duty.” -- Vessels “affiliated with the enemy” will not be permitted to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, while other ships may transit if they comply with Iranian regulations. -- Due to ongoing “enemy threats,” Iran will maintain a permanent mechanism for controlling the strait even after any conflict. -- The US restrictions on maritime movement are “illegal” and an act of “piracy.” Warning: If the security of the ports of the Islamic Republic of Iran… is threatened, then no port in the Persian Gulf or the Sea of Oman will remain safe.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 “波斯湾和阿曼湾港口的安全要么属于所有人，要么谁也不属于”。伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里中校在美军中央司令部（CENTCOM）准备从美国东部时间上午10点开始实施封锁时发表声明：-- 伊朗武装部队将捍卫领海的国家主权视为“自然和法律义务”。-- “与敌人有关”的船只将不被允许通过霍尔木兹海峡，而其他船只如果遵守伊朗法规，则可以通行。-- 由于持续的“敌人威胁”，即使在任何冲突之后，伊朗也将维持一个控制海峡的永久机制。-- 美国对海上交通的限制是“非法的”，是一种“海盗”行为。警告：如果伊朗伊斯兰共和国港口的安全……受到威胁，那么波斯湾或阿曼湾的任何港口都不会保持安全。

text: Nuno Felix RT @elikowaz : Orban is gone. His successor is a former Fidesz insider and isn’t hostile to Israel. But he’s committed to EU reintegration — and for the Netanyahu government, that’s the whole problem. 1/5 https://twitter.com/elikowaz/status/2043539919457395022/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @elikowaz : 欧尔班下台了。他的继任者是前青民盟内部人士，对以色列并不敌对。但他致力于欧盟的重新整合——对于内塔尼亚胡政府来说，这才是整个问题所在。 1/5 https://twitter.com/elikowaz/status/2043539919457395022/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Saudi Arabia's crude oil sales to China expected to drop by half next month as the Middle East war disrupts flows and drives up prices. - Bloomberg tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 由于中东战争扰乱了石油流动并推高了价格，沙特阿拉伯下个月对中国的原油销售预计将减半。 - 彭博社 推文

text: WarMonitor Ships are not “headed to our country.” They’re avoiding Hormuz, turning around, or just waiting it out. This is disruption, not some instant reroute, and it only shows how fragile the system really is. Trump: We have more oil than Russia and Saudi Arabia put together. Boats are heading to our country empty and will go back full of oil so they do not have to go through Hormuz. They are using us for now, but ultimately that will be corrected. 1/ https://twitter.com/Mylovanov/status/2043567823910269371/video/1 - Tymofiy Mylovanov tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 船只并没有“前往我国”。它们在避开霍尔木兹海峡，掉头，或者只是在等待。这是一种干扰，而不是什么即时的改道，它只显示了这个系统实际上是多么脆弱。特朗普：我们拥有的石油比俄罗斯和沙特加起来还要多。船只正空着前往我国，并将装满石油回去，这样它们就不必经过霍尔木兹海峡。它们现在在利用我们，但最终这会得到纠正。 1/ https://twitter.com/Mylovanov/status/2043567823910269371/video/1 - 季莫菲·米洛瓦诺夫 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: How is the ceasefire holding? Trump: It is holding well. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043581151466430536/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 记者：停火维持得如何？特朗普：维持得很好。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043581151466430536/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran Deputy Parliament Speaker Ali Nikzad: The Americans came to Isfahan not to rescue a pilot but to take ‘something else’ so they could take it back and display it to the world https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043580709273542841/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会副议长阿里·尼克扎德：美国人来到伊斯法罕不是为了营救飞行员，而是为了拿走“别的东西”，这样他们就可以把它带回去并向世界展示 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043580709273542841/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Indonesia and the U.S. are in talks on an agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to Indonesian airspace, according to Indonesia's Defense Minister. - Reuters https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043580383145377863/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel IDF: The tunnel did not cross into Israeli territory. IDF says its Yahalom combat engineering unit and 7th Brigade destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel in southern Lebanon used to stage attacks against Israeli forces. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043579257129972161/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军：该隧道没有穿过以色列领土。以色列国防军表示，其Yahalom战斗工程部队和第7旅摧毁了黎巴嫩南部的一条真主党地下隧道，该隧道曾被用于策划针对以色列军队的袭击。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043579257129972161/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Visioner 🇭🇺 Péter Márki-Zay, in an effort to improve relations with Brussels, is unblocking the allocation of a €90 billion loan to Ukraine — Politico. 🔹 At the same time, the future prime minister stated during the pre-election campaign that he opposes supplying Hungarian weapons or finances to Kyiv, and also opposes accelerating Ukraine's accession process to the European Union. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇭🇺 彼得·马尔基-扎伊为了改善与布鲁塞尔的关系，正在解除对乌克兰900亿欧元贷款的分配限制——Politico。 🔹 与此同时，这位未来的总理在竞选期间表示，他反对向基辅提供匈牙利的武器或资金，也反对加速乌克兰加入欧盟的进程。 推文

text: 🇺🇦 🇭🇺 The Ukrainian Foreign Ministry removed the recommendation for their citizens not to travel to Hungary 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🇭🇺 乌克兰外交部取消了建议其公民不要前往匈牙利的建议 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 Indonesia says it is in talks with the United States over a potential agreement to grant U.S. military aircraft access to its airspace, though no deal has been finalized. U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is expected to meet Indonesian Defense Minister Sjafrie Sjamsoeddin later Monday for further discussions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇺🇸 印度尼西亚表示，正在与美国就一项潜在协议进行谈判，以允许美国军用飞机进入其领空，尽管尚未达成最终协议。美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯预计将于周一晚些时候会见印尼国防部长沙夫里·沙姆苏丁进行进一步讨论。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 Peter Magyar, who won the elections in Hungary, announced that he would negotiate with Putin - in particular, about energy supplies. "We will have to sit down at the negotiating table with the Russian president. The geographical position of neither Russia nor Hungary will change. Our energy dependence on Russia will also remain. We will negotiate" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 在匈牙利大选中获胜的彼得·马扎尔宣布，他将与普京进行谈判——特别是关于能源供应的问题。“我们将不得不与俄罗斯总统坐在谈判桌前。俄罗斯和匈牙利的地理位置都不会改变。我们对俄罗斯的能源依赖也将持续。我们将进行谈判” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
